storyDialogue.text: SYSTEM: RE-LINKING... Smoke fills your lungs. Rain tastes like copper. Welcome back to the rot.
You were a 'Eraser' for the Sovereign Direct. A high-end ghost until your handlers pulled the plug on your life insurance.
The contract was simple: infiltrate the Slags, extract the Drive, and leave a trail of cold bodies. But the ghosts bit back.
Scrape the girls. Harvest the Neural-Drive and incinerate the meat. Total scrub. No footprints, no witnesses.
Locked in. But something is bleeding into the comms. Ghost data is crawling. Watch your six, kid. This feels like a setup.
[glitch] DE-SYNC. Visuals are flatlining! They’re cooking your brain from the inside! Get the fuck out! [electricuted]
[shadows] Late for your own execution, rat. We don't take prisoners in the Slags. We just take parts.
[shadows] Eva, wait. He's leaking neural fluid. Did we fry him? He looks like a discarded toy. Pathetic for a killer.
Let him rot. They gutted our district for a quarterly report. It’s time for some reciprocal violence. Hold him still.
[glitch] ERROR: SYNAPTIC COLLAPSE Ru...ner?! They... they're burning your files... REBOOT...
Eva, look at his port. It's wide open. We can use his bypass to crack the Vault. Don't waste the meat yet.
Fine. Neural-shackle him. If he even twitches, I'll carve the truth out of his throat with a rusted blade.
[electricuted] The signal dies in a scream of white noise. Your world turns into a jagged shard of ice. CRITICAL FAILURE [nuke]
[blink] Reboot! You're lucky. Most don't survive a neural spike like that. Your bosses tried to wipe you. I'm Tia.
Stay back, Tia. He's a predator. We should've flatlined him while his fans were still spinning. He smells like Corp blood.
Corporate filth like him have one job: erasing us. Stop treating a corpse-in-waiting like a pet project. He’s a bomb.
But look at his memory logs... they're being scorched. Someone's burning his past to hide their own sins.
This isn't a negotiation. One wrong move and you're scrap metal. Blink twice if you understand your place.
Listen to me, 'Ghost'. You’re a dead man walking. Your own people put a kill-switch in your skull. It’s ticking.
I can stop the wipe, but I need your access codes to the Sovereign Hub. We need to eat, and you need to breathe.
So here’s the deal. Do you want to die as a corporate puppet, or do you want to help us burn the stage down? Choose fast.
